description: The Orekhovskaya gang was a powerful Russian criminal organization based in Moscow, active from the late 1980s to the early 2000s. Founded in 1988 by Sergey Timofeev, it consisted mainly of young former athletes. The gang engaged in extortion, racketeering, money laundering, and murder, and was responsible for thousands of killings. It eventually fragmented and was absorbed by the Solntsevskaya Bratva.
